Deadpool & Wolverine (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $636,745,858Details
International Box Office $701,327,787
Worldwide Box Office $1,338,073,645
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $5,924,764
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $16,369,959
Total $22,294,723
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A listless Wade Wilson toils away in civilian life. His days as the morally flexible mercenary, Deadpool, behind him. When his homeworld faces an existential threat, Wade must reluctantly suit-up again with an even more reluctantlier… reluctanter? Reluctantest? He must convince a reluctant Wolverine to—F*ck. Synopses are so f*cking stupid.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$211,435,291 (33.2% of total gross)
Legs:3.01 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:47.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$200,000,000 (worldwide box office is 6.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,210 opening theaters/4,330 max. theaters, 9.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $673,340,453

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 26th, 2024 (Wide) by Walt Disney
July 26th, 2024 (IMAX) by Walt Disney
International Releases: July 24th, 2024 (Wide), released as Deadpool & Wolverine (デッドプール＆ウルヴァリン) (Japan)
July 24th, 2024 (Wide) (Denmark)
July 24th, 2024 (Wide) (Austria)
July 24th, 2024 (Wide) (Netherlands)
July 24th, 2024 (Wide) (Hong Kong)
Video Release: October 1st, 2024 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong bloody violence and language throughout, gore and sexual references.
(Rating bulletin 2837 (cert #55028), 6/5/2024)
Running Time: 127 minutes
Franchise: Deadpool, X-Men, Marvel Cinematic Universe, Wolverine
Cast, crew, or production detail: Breaking the Fourth Wall, Franchise Crossover
Filming location (country): England, United Kingdom

Subgenre: Action Comedy
Time period setting: 2010s

Genre:Action

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

A listless Wade Wilson toils away in civilian life. His days as the morally flexible mercenary, Deadpool, behind him. When his homeworld faces an existential threat, Wade must reluctantly suit-up again with an even more reluctantlier… reluctanter? Reluctantest? He must convince a reluctant Wolverine to—F*ck. Synopses are so f*cking stupid.
